title: Grand Larceny
writer: Charles Kenyon, Bess Meredyth, Albert Payson Terhune
actors: Claire Windsor, Elliott Dexter, Richard Tucker
plot: Flirtatious Kathleen is married to a rather hide-bound and stern husband, John. Kathleen is free-spirited and is unconcerned about the consequences of her flirtations. When John becomes convinced that Kathleen's dalliance with Cli...
